text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hear a particularly loud voice while I'm walking
down the hallway...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Hey, you! Wanna give this riddle a go?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: S-sorry, I can't! I have training to get to...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Howdy! Fancy a special riddle? It comes with a
big surprise and everything!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Sorry, but the teacher wants to speak with me...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Hmm... Oh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Did we just make eye contact?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Good timing, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Truth is, one of my pals told me an awful
interesting riddle!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh. Think ya got what it takes to solve it?
Let's get to riddlin'!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: What's orange and sounds like a pigeon?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Bingo! Got it in one!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
You sure are somethin', Trainer! I still can't make
heads or tails of it!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I mean... I ain't never heard a carrot sound like
anything...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Well, whatever! As long as everybody's having
fun, that's good enough!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Yay! I'm gonna go ask more people this riddle,
then! See ya later!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Grumble...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Actually, all this carrot talk's got my tummy
rumbling.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I'll save the riddlin' for another time. See
ya!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh, guess you're stuck! The answer's "a
carrot"!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry. I had some trouble at first too.
Ahaha...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Actually, why is "carrot" the answer? Carrots don't sound like pigeons.
choice_data_list: I think it's "parrot," not "pigeon." It rhymes.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh... Ya know what? You're right! It is supposed to be "parrot"!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Carrot... sounds like "parrot." That makes total
sense!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Thanks a million, Trainer! You big smarty-pants,
you!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Now I gotta go let everybody know! See ya!
